publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-04-28 23:57:35 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Course materials for courses; research reports; a student housing project study from the University of Pennsylvania; presentation and consulting notes for various hotels; research interview notes; publications; lecture notes and the Homeless Program Summary.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of Hotel Administration, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Course materials for courses in Financial Analysis and Planning, Hospitality Financial Management, Integrated Case Studies in the Hospitality Industry, and Financial Accounting; research reports, primarily from the firm of Laventhol & Horwath; a student housing project study from the University of Pennsylvania; presentation and consulting notes for various hotels; research interview notes; publications; lecture notes and the Homeless Program Summary.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: James J. Eyster papers, #28-2-2327. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Bars (Drinking establishments) -- Finance.
Taverns (Inns) -- Finance.
Hotels -- Finance.
Hotel management schools.
Hotel management -- Study and teaching.
Homeless persons.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
